_rationale: Pins `--exclude-tests` filtering. Note: the path heuristic in src/cli/search.cpp::path_is_test() flags any path with a `tests/` directory component (an intentional safety net for projects with the convention `tests/foo.cpp`). Because this corpus is itself stored under the lci-cpp `tests/` tree, ALL three files match the heuristic and the result set drops to zero. The spec deliberately pins this 0-result behavior — it confirms the flag is plumbed through and the heuristic fires on directory components, not just basename markers. Basename-only test detection is exercised separately by tests/cli_test.cpp::path_is_test unit tests.
